nm)%3B%0A%7D).then(function%20(files)%20%7B%0Avar%20shared%20%3D%20%5B%5D%3B%0Aif%20(files%5B%22xl%2FsharedStrings.xml%22%5D)%20%7B%0Avar%20sis%20%3D%20xmlDoc(utf8(files%5B%22xl%2FsharedStrings.xml%22%5D)).getElementsByTagName(%22si%22)%2C%20i%3B%0Afor%20(i%20%3D%200%3B%20i%20%3C%20sis.length%3B%20i%2B%2B)%20shared.push(joinTs(sis%5Bi%5D))%3B%0A%7D%0Avar%20wsName%20%3D%20firstSheetPath(files)%2C%20wsBytes%20%3D%20wsName%20%26%26%20files%5BwsName%5D%3B%0Aif%20(!wsBytes)%20throw%20new%20Error(%22no%20worksheet%22)%3B%0Avar%20rowEls%20%3D%20xmlDoc(utf8(wsBytes)).getElementsByTagName(%22row%22)%2C%20rows%20%3D%20%5B%5D%2C%20ri%3B%0Afor%20(ri%20%3D%200%3B%20ri%20%3C%20rowEls.length%3B%20ri%2B%2B)%20%7B%0Avar%20cells%20%3D%20rowEls%5Bri%5D.getElementsByTagName(%22c%22)%2C%20tmp%20%3D%20%5B%5D%2C%20maxc%20%3D%20-1%2C%20ci%2C%20row%20%3D%20%5B%5D%3B%0Afor%20(ci%20%3D%200%3B%20ci%20%3C%20cells.length%3B%20ci%2B%2B)%20%7B%0Avar%20c%20%3D%20cells%5Bci%5D%2C%20idx%20%3D%20colToIdx(c.getAttribute(%22r%22))%3B%0Aif%20(idx%20%3C%200)%20idx%20%3D%20ci%3B%0Avar%20t%20%3D%20c.getAttribute(%22t%22)%2C%20val%20%3D%20%22%22%2C%20vEl%3B%0Aif%20(t%20%3D%3D%3D%20%22s%22)%20%7B%20vEl%20%3D%20c.getElementsByTagName(%22v%22)%5B0%5D%3B%20var%20si2%20%3D%20vEl%20%3F%20parseInt(vEl.textContent%2C%2010)%20%3A%20-1%3B%20val%20%3D%20(si2%20%3E%3D%200%20%26%26%20si2%20%3C%20shared.length)%20%3F%20shared%5Bsi2%5D%20%3A%20%22%22%3B%20%7D%0Aelse%20if%20(t%20%3D%3D%3D%20%22inlineStr%22)%20%7B%20var%20isEl%20%3D%20c.getElementsByTagName(%22is%22)%5B0%5D%3B%20val%20%3D%20isEl%20%3F%20joinTs(isEl)%20%3A%20%22%22%3B%20%7D%0Aelse%20%7B%20vEl%20%3D%20c.getElementsByTagName(%22v%22)%5B0%5D%3B%20val%20%3D%20vEl%20%3F%20(vEl.textContent%20%7C%7C%20%22%22)%20%3A%20%22%22%3B%20%7D%0Atmp%5Bidx%5D%20%3D%20val%3B%0Aif%20(idx%20%3E%20maxc)%20maxc%20%3D%20idx%3B%0A%7D%0Afor%20(ci%20%3D%200%3B%20ci%20%3C%3D%20maxc%3B%20ci%2B%2B)%20row.push(tmp%5Bci%5D%20%3D%3D%20null%20%3F%20%22%22%20%3A%20tmp%5Bci%5D)%3B%0Arows.push(ro
